hooks.command: if [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && [ ! -d memory/episodes ]; then mkdir -p memory/episodes/archive && echo 'Auto-created memory/episodes/ (CLAUDE.md present)'; fi; if [ -d memory/episodes ]; then echo 'memory/episodes/ exists — episodic capture available'; else echo 'NO_MEMORY_DIR'; fi

hooks.prompt:
Context is about to be compacted. Write a session summary to memory/episodes/YYYY-MM-DD.md (use today's date).

Rules:
1. If NO_MEMORY_DIR was returned by the command, do nothing — reply NO_REPLY.
2. READ the existing memory/episodes/YYYY-MM-DD.md file first — it may already have entries from earlier today. You MUST preserve ALL existing content.
3. Append a new section after any existing content:
   ## HH:MM — Session Summary
   - What was worked on
   - Decisions made (if any)
   - Facts discovered (if any)
   - Corrections to existing knowledge (if any) — also update the source memory file directly
   - Action items (if any)
4. Keep each bullet to one concise line. Omit empty categories.
5. If the session was trivial, one line is fine — but always write something.
6. NEVER overwrite or discard existing entries.

hooks.command: if [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && [ ! -d memory/episodes ]; then mkdir -p memory/episodes/archive; fi; if [ -d memory/episodes ]; then echo 'memory/episodes/ exists — episodic capture available'; else echo 'NO_MEMORY_DIR'; fi

hooks.prompt:
Session is ending (/clear was called). Write a session summary to memory/episodes/YYYY-MM-DD.md (use today's date) before this conversation is destroyed.

Rules:
1. If NO_MEMORY_DIR was returned by the command, do nothing — reply NO_REPLY.
2. READ the existing memory/episodes/YYYY-MM-DD.md file first — it may already have entries from earlier today. You MUST preserve ALL existing content.
3. Append a new section after any existing content:
   ## HH:MM — Session Summary
   - What was worked on
   - Decisions made (if any)
   - Facts discovered (if any)
   - Corrections to existing knowledge (if any) — also update the source memory file directly
   - Action items (if any)
   - Project state changes (if any) — also update memory/MEMORY.md if it exists
4. Keep each bullet to one concise line. Omit empty categories.
5. If the session was trivial, one line is fine — but always write something.
6. NEVER overwrite or discard existing entries.

hooks.command: if [ -d memory/episodes ]; then echo '--- Context was compacted. Recent episodic memory: ---'; cat memory/episodes/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No episodes captured today yet.'; echo '---'; cat memory/episodes/$(date -v-1d +%Y-%m-%d 2>/dev/null || date -d 'yesterday' +%Y-%m-%d 2>/dev/null).md 2>/dev/null || true; fi
